view.ipHelpText: If connection is coming from different stronghold coordinates, kindly update them.
view.passwordEncrypted: Secret passphrases are stored in a separate enchanted vault.
view.ticketClosed: This quest board is closed, so replies are disabled. If you still require assistance, feel free to post a new quest and we shall be glad to help.
view.replyPlaceholder: Detailed account of the issue or quest details
view.replyHint: Creating separate quests for new issues helps our guild officers prioritize and resolve them faster.

new.title: Post New Quest
new.subject: Subject
new.subjectValidation: Please enter a brief description of the issue or quest.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: The guild thanks you for helping us maintain an orderly quest board by submitting one request per quest.
new.descriptionValidation: Please enter a detailed description of the issue or quest.
new.fileNote: Note: Only image artifacts - gif/jpeg/png types are allowed.
new.allowAccessLabel: I allow InterServer to access my stronghold and perform modifications
new.accessNote: Please note: By posting a support quest InterServer may need to access, debug, or modify files in your guild membership. This requirement is needed in order to provide technical support. Please only continue if you agree.
